name: create_issue
description: Create a new issue in Linear within a specific team. You must provide a team ID and title at minimum. Optionally set the description (supports Markdown), priority (0=none, 1=urgent, 2=high, 3=medium, 4=low), assignee, labels, project, and cycle. Returns the created issue with its identifier.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation string to create an issue.
parameters.example: mutation { issueCreate(input: { teamId: "TEAM_ID", title: "Bug fix", description: "Fix the login issue" }) { success issue { id identifier title url } } }

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The UUID of the team to create the issue in.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: The issue description in Markdown format.
parameters.example: Users are experiencing timeout errors when logging in with SSO. Need to investigate the SAML response handling.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority level: 0 = No priority, 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Medium, 4 = Low.

parameters.name: assigneeId
parameters.description: UUID of the user to assign the issue to.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: UUID of the project to associate this issue with.

parameters.name: labelIds
parameters.description: Array of label UUIDs to attach to the issue.

body.query: mutation IssueCreate($input: IssueCreateInput!) { issueCreate(input: $input) { success issue { id identifier title url priority state { name } assignee { name } } } }

input.title: Fix authentication timeout
input.description: Users are experiencing timeout errors when logging in with SSO.
